articles.title: THIS TECH COMPANY GREW 32,481%...
articles.summary: No, it's not Nvidia… It's MODE MOBILE, 2023's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte.

articles.title: Secure your spot now and earn up to 100% bonus shares.
MISTRAL SMALL 3.1
articles.summary: Building on Mistral Small 3, this new model comes with improved text performance, multimodal understanding, and an expanded context window of up to 128k tokens. The model outperforms comparable models like Gemma 3 and GPT-4o Mini while delivering inference speeds of 150 tokens per second.

articles.title: COURT REJECTS ELON MUSK'S ATTEMPT TO HALT OPENAI
articles.summary: A court dismissed key claims in Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, rejecting his preliminary injunction request.

articles.title: UIPATH LOOKS FOR A PATH TO GROWTH WITH PEAK AGENTIC AI ACQUISITION
articles.summary: UiPath has acquired Peak.ai to enhance its AI and automation services for specific verticals, notably in retail and manufacturing. Despite recent revenue challenges and a downgraded forecast, UiPath aims to capitalize on Peak's decision-making AI capabilities to boost cross-selling opportunities and capture more market share. The acquisition reflects a strategic shift as UiPath seeks to integrate AI advancements into its existing offerings.

articles.title: ONE-STEP DIFFUSION WITH CONTINUOUS-TIME CONSISTENCY DISTILLATION
articles.summary: The Nvidia team has released a fast version of their SANA image generation model called SANA-sprint. This model is shockingly fast at generating images while still maintaining quality. The team uses a novel distillation method that builds on consistency distillation. An open problem in this domain is to ensure these consistency models are still easy to fine-tune.

articles.title: LLM-DRIVEN GENETIC ALGORITHM
articles.summary: Funsearch is a new implementation of an LLM-driven genetic algorithm designed to assist mathematicians in solving combinatorial and number-theoretic problems without requiring machine learning expertise.

articles.title: VISUAL REASONING FOR AUTONOMOUS DRIVING
articles.summary: DriveLMM-o1 introduces a dataset and benchmark for step-wise visual reasoning in autonomous driving, improving reasoning accuracy and decision-making in AI-driven driving scenarios.

articles.title: CSM SPEECH MODEL ON MLX
articles.summary: Sesame released a 1B model last week for conversational speech generation. This repository contains an Apple native MLX version that can run quickly on most MacBooks.

articles.title: A SPEECH-FOCUSED MULTIMODAL LLM
articles.summary: MMS-LLaMA is an efficient multimodal speech LLM framework for automatic visual speech recognition (AVSR), optimizing token length while preserving linguistic content.

articles.title: PERSONALIZED DRUG TREATMENT WITH TXAGENT
articles.summary: TxAgent is an AI-powered system that analyzes drug interactions, contraindications, and patient-specific data to generate adaptive treatment plans.

articles.title: TESTING EVERY OPEN SOURCE HANDWRITING DETECTION MODEL
articles.summary: A comprehensive post that explores the performance of every model on Hugging Face for handwriting classification/signature detection.

articles.title: GEMINI 2.0 FLASH REMOVING WATERMARKS
articles.summary: Google's Gemini 2.0 Flash can remove watermarks from images while intelligently filling in the missing areas, demonstrating an advanced capability that has sparked discussions on copyright and ethical use.

articles.title: PATHS AND WAYSTATIONS IN AI SAFETY
articles.summary: This essay outlines a framework for addressing the AI alignment problem by distinguishing between the technical parameters ("problem profile") and civilization's ability to respond ("competence profile"). Key to this approach are three "security factors": safety progress, risk evaluation, and capability restraint. The essay sets up a discussion on using future AI labor to enhance these factors and explores various strategic milestones for improving AI safety.

articles.title: YET ANOTHER AI ROBOTICS FIRM LANDS MAJOR FUNDING, AS DEXTERITY CLOSES LATEST ROUND
articles.summary: Dexterity has raised $95 million, valuing it at $1.65 billion, to advance its AI-powered industrial robots.

articles.title: MARK CUBAN SAYS AI IS 'NEVER THE ANSWER,' IT'S A 'TOOL'
articles.summary: At SXSW, Mark Cuban emphasized that AI is a tool, not a solution, for helping small businesses grow.

articles.title: POSITIONING STARTUPS IN THE AGE OF AI
articles.summary: Join an in-person session with Fireworks AI's VP of Marketing, Alan Hsia, to learn about building a strong AI brand and crafting a differentiated GTM strategy.
